meaning: adj.芦苇丛生的,芦苇做的,芦苇状的,细长的,脆弱的,尖声的,似笛声的
examples: To my right was the small loch, edged with deep reedy banks of moss and thymy turf.
He spoke with a reedy, quavering voice.
Travis was arrested and taken to the Denton County jail, sheriff's spokeman Tom Reedy told CNN on Wednesday.
The sea trout, if not the salmon, began to snatch and tear off with them to the reedy shallows.
